backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a lottery ticket system with functions to buy tickets (buyTicket), retrieve individual tickets (getTicket), and query all tickets by user ID (getAllTicketsByUser), storing tickets in a Map with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented lottery features: ticket purchase functionality, lottery drawing mechanism, results viewing interface, vibrant lottery-themed visual design, and integration of generated lottery images as static assets.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of seven frontend files describing the lottery app's React components, hooks, and styling configuration including authentication, ticket purchase, ticket display, and lottery-themed design system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes, including lottery-specific color tokens and chart colors, with global border and background styling applied to all elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the lottery game application with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, and a root div that loads the React app via main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with Internet Identity authentication, lottery-themed header with gradient branding and animated sparkles, welcome screen for unauthenticated users, and two-column layout displaying TicketPurchase and MyTickets components for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/MyTickets.tsx: React component for viewing lottery tickets by user ID with search input, loading states, scrollable ticket list using TicketCard components, and empty state handling showing total ticket count.
frontend/src/components/TicketCard.tsx: Reusable ticket display component rendering individual lottery tickets with gradient styling, ticket ID, owner information, and decorative perforated border design with "Good Luck" message.
frontend/src/components/TicketPurchase.t: Ticket purchase form component with lottery ticket illustration, user ID input field, buy button with loading states, and toast notifications for success/error feedback using the useBuyTicket mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for the application, managing login/logout flows, identity persistence, and authentication state with support for delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for lottery operations including fetching user tickets (useGetAllTicketsByUser) and purchasing tickets (useBuyTicket) with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including lottery-specific color tokens (gold, green, prize) and design system tokens for borders, backgrounds, and UI components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and lottery-specific color utilities.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the lottery game application's architecture, features, requirements, and pending feature requests including ticket purchase, drawings, results viewing, and backend state management.
